Intapp Ireland Limited

Block A, George's Quay Plaza

George's Quay

Dublin 2, Ireland

Payment by Wire Transfer:
Name of Beneficiary: INTAPP IRELAND LIMITED Name of Bank: Bank of America Account Number: 73542013 IBAN: GB52 BOFA 1650 5073 5420 13 BIC: BOFAGB22 Payments in GBP can be processed via wire or ACH. Payments in currencies other than GBP must be submitted via wire transfer.
